=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/tsExpectErrorDoesNotSuppressEffectDiagnostics.ts(11,14): error TS377004: This Effect requires a service that is missing from the expected Effect context: `EnvA`. effect(missingEffectContext)
/.src/tsExpectErrorDoesNotSuppressEffectDiagnostics.ts(15,1): error TS377001: This Effect value is neither yielded nor used in an assignment. effect(floatingEffect)
/.src/tsExpectErrorDoesNotSuppressEffectDiagnostics.ts(19,1): error TS377001: This Effect value is neither yielded nor used in an assignment. effect(floatingEffect)
/.src/tsExpectErrorDoesNotSuppressEffectDiagnostics.ts(22,1): error TS2578: Unused '@ts-expect-error' directive.


==== /.src/tsExpectErrorDoesNotSuppressEffectDiagnostics.ts (4 errors) ====
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    interface EnvA {
      _tag: "EnvA"
    }
    
    declare const effectWithContext: Effect.Effect<number, never, EnvA>
    
    // TS expect-error suppresses TS2322 but NOT Effect TS377004
    // @ts-expect-error
    export const missingContext: Effect.Effect<number> = effectWithContext
                 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS377004: This Effect requires a service that is missing from the expected Effect context: `EnvA`. effect(missingEffectContext)
    
    // TS expect-error does NOT suppress floating Effect TS377001
    // @ts-expect-error
    Effect.succeed("floating")
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS377001: This Effect value is neither yielded nor used in an assignment. effect(floatingEffect)
    
    // TS ignore does NOT suppress floating Effect TS377001
    // @ts-ignore
    Effect.succeed("ignored")
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS377001: This Effect value is neither yielded nor used in an assignment. effect(floatingEffect)
    
    // TS expect-error combined with effect-diagnostics-next-line suppresses the Effect diagnostic
    // @ts-expect-error
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2578: Unused '@ts-expect-error' directive.
    // @effect-diagnostics-next-line floatingEffect:off
    Effect.succeed("both suppressed")
